plans.title: Elderly Companionship & Grief Support

objectives.description: Reduce grandmother's reported loneliness score by 50%
objectives.successIndicator: Monthly check-in surveys showing improved mood

activities.title: Weekly Companionship Visits
activities.description: Team members visit for 1-2 hours each week for conversation and activities

activities.title: Monthly Group Outings
activities.description: Organized trips to parks, temples, or community events suitable for elderly

plans.ethicsDescription: All interactions respect the grandmother's autonomy and grief process. Visits are scheduled at her convenience. Team members are trained in respectful communication around loss and aging.

plans.title: Academic Mentorship & Emotional Support

objectives.successIndicator: Self-reported confidence increase in monthly check-ins

objectives.description: Connect family with university guidance resources
objectives.successIndicator: Completed at least one counseling session

activities.title: Weekly Study Mentorship
activities.description: Volunteer students help with exam subjects and study strategies

activities.title: Parent Support Circle
activities.description: Monthly meeting with other parents to share experiences and resources

plans.ethicsDescription: Mentorship focuses on empowerment rather than doing work for the student. All advice respects the student's own aspirations. Family privacy is maintained in all discussions.

plans.title: Elderly Care & Caregiver Support

objectives.description: Connect family with healthcare assistance programs
objectives.successIndicator: At least one assistance program referral completed

activities.title: Weekly Companionship Visits
activities.description: Provide respite care and social interaction for elderly

activities.title: Healthcare Navigation Support
activities.description: Help family understand and access available healthcare resources

plans.ethicsDescription: All care recommendations respect the family's values and decisions. We provide support without judgment, respecting cultural traditions around elder care.

plans.title: Social Integration Support

objectives.description: Children report having at least 2 new school friends
Family participates in at least 2 community events

activities.title: Group Activity Sessions
activities.description: Monthly organized activities mixing our families with community members

activities.title: School Connection Support
activities.description: Help parents understand and navigate the school system

plans.ethicsDescription: Integration activities respect the family's pace and comfort level. We do not pressure children to conform but rather help them find their place authentically. Cultural traditions are honored and celebrated.
